problem_statement: The GovernedPlanningProfile foundation contract needs one no-effect adapter that proves an existing compiled plan and simulation receipt can be projected into profile admission evidence without creating a new planner, execution spine, dispatch path, or runtime authority.
success_criteria: a read-only adapter projects compiled gateway plan fields and causal simulation receipt fields into a deterministic GovernedPlanningProfileAdmissionReport
the admission report schema denies execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, terminal closure, and success claims
shadow mismatches are explicit for identity, topology, and simulation drift
promotion blockers are explicit for authority, evidence, closure, blocked plans, and Foundation Mode constraints
focused tests cover high-risk plans, identity mismatch, topology drift, blocked plans, schema validation, and goal-compiler import-boundary preservation
non_goals: do not import the goal compiler into a second gateway runtime consumer
do not register the adapter in a router, worker, dispatch path, or live service
do not execute, dispatch, approve, replan, write memory, call connectors, or claim terminal closure
do not replace the existing GovernedPlanningProfile schema or source lineage bindings
constraints: the adapter is deterministic, structural, read-only, and reversible
missing operator shadow-pilot, runtime promotion, replay, recovery, and closure evidence remains AwaitingEvidence
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because the adapter does not normalize or decompose text
evidence_required: SDLC design and security review artifacts
